message:
Add SoA columnar reads with batch WASM exports

Columnar (Struct-of-Arrays) optimization for homogeneous object arrays:
- doc_read_column_f64: reads entire number column in ONE WASM call
- doc_read_column_bool: reads entire boolean column in ONE WASM call
- doc_read_column_str: reads string ptr/len pairs in ONE WASM call
- Row view with defineProperty getters (lazy class, no Proxy on rows)
- Columns materialize lazily on first property access

Results (1000 items):
- 1 number prop:    0.78x (22% FASTER than JSON.parse)
- 2 number props:   0.97x (3% faster)
- 3 non-str props:  0.96x (4% faster)
- All 5 props:      1.36x (strings still per-element)
